home.heroSubtitle: Adopt or foster a pet today and make a difference in their lives. Join thousands of families in Jordan who have found their furry best friends.
home.findMatchSub: These lovely pets are looking for their forever homes.
home.howItWorksSub: The journey to finding your new best friend is simple and supported every step of the way.
home.findAPetDesc: Browse our database of rescued pets looking for homes in Jordan.
home.applyDesc: Submit an adoption or foster application to connect with the pet's owner or shelter.
home.bringHomeDesc: Once approved, welcome your new family member and start a new chapter.
home.successStoriesSub: Read about the lives we've changed together.

foster.heroSubtitle: Fostering saves lives. By providing a temporary home, you help a pet transition to their forever family and free up space for another rescue.
foster.noFosterNeedsSub: Check back later or adjust your filters.

about.title: Building a more compassionate Jordan for all animals
about.whyDesc1: Tabanni (تبنّي) which means "Adoption" in Arabic, was born from a simple realization: Jordan has thousands of loving animals looking for homes, and just as many compassionate people looking for pets. The missing link was a centralized, easy-to-use platform to connect them.
about.whyDesc2: Our mission is to end animal homelessness in Jordan by making adoption the first choice, promoting fostering as a crucial stepping stone, and educating the public about animal welfare.
about.vettedPetsDesc: All listed pets are screened for health and behavior.
about.communityDrivenDesc: Powered by volunteers, rescuers, and animal lovers.
about.getInTouchSub: Have questions about adoption? Want to partner with us? We'd love to hear from you.

login.welcome: Welcome back! Sign in to continue.

register.subtitle: Create your account to get started.
register.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
register.passwordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.

lostFound.noReportsSub: There are no {{type}} pets matching your filters.
lostFound.submitReportDesc: Provide as many details as possible to help identify the pet.
lostFound.title: Lost & Found

gallery.noStories: No stories yet. Check back soon!

shop.title: Discover Something You'll Love!
shop.donateDesc: Your support whether supplies or a small donation can make a big difference in a pet's life.
shop.fosterDesc: Open your home for a little while, and you could change a pet's whole world with a bit of safety, warmth, and love.

lostFoundDetail.tipsLost: Tips to Help Find This Pet
lostFoundDetail.tipLost1: Share this post on your social media to spread the word.
lostFoundDetail.tipLost2: Check nearby shelters and veterinary clinics.
lostFoundDetail.tipLost3: Look in the area where the pet was last seen, especially early morning.
lostFoundDetail.tipLost4: Put out their favorite food or toys to attract them back.
lostFoundDetail.tipLost5: Contact local community groups in the area.
lostFoundDetail.tipFound1: Keep the pet in a safe, warm place away from other animals.
lostFoundDetail.tipFound2: Take the pet to a vet to check for a microchip.
lostFoundDetail.tipFound3: Post photos in local neighborhood groups online.
lostFoundDetail.tipFound4: Avoid giving the pet a new name to help reunification.
lostFoundDetail.tipFound5: Contact local shelters to report the found pet.
lostFoundDetail.spottedMessage: Did you spot this pet? Contact the owner immediately!
lostFoundDetail.isYourPet: Is this your missing pet? Reach out now!

notFound.message: Did you forget to add the page to the router?

aiChat.welcome: Hi! I'm Tabbani's AI assistant 🐾 I can help you find the perfect pet to adopt or foster, answer questions about the adoption process, or share tips on pet care in Jordan. How can I help you today?
aiChat.quickReply1: What's the difference between adopting and fostering?
aiChat.quickReply2: How do I prepare for a new pet?
aiChat.quickReply3: Which pets are good for apartments?
aiChat.quickReply4: How does the adoption process work?
aiChat.error: Sorry, I'm having trouble connecting right now. Please try again in a moment.

donate.title: Support Our Mission
donate.subtitle: 100% of your donation goes directly towards food, medical care, and shelter for rescued animals across Jordan. Every dinar makes a difference.
donate.descriptionPlaceholder: E.g. 2 large bags of adult dog food, 3 new fleece blankets...
donate.thankYouDesc: Your donation helps rescued animals across Jordan find loving homes. You're making a real difference!
donate.whyDonate1: Helps rescue injured animals from the streets
donate.whyDonate3: Provides food for fosters who can't afford it
donate.paymentNotAvailable: Payment provider not available. Please try CliQ instead.
donate.failedSubmit: Failed to submit. Please try again.
donate.cliqNote: After completing the transfer, click the button below to confirm. We will verify and mark your donation as complete.
donate.goFundMeSubtitle: Help us reach our goal and transform more lives
donate.everyPetDeserves: Every Pet Deserves a Loving Home
donate.goFundMeDesc: Help us rescue, rehabilitate, and rehome stray and abandoned animals across Jordan. Your support pays for medical care, food, and shelter while we find them their forever families.
